headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Teledyne Technologies, Raises Price Target to $614
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $603 to $614.

headline: Teledyne Technologies Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) opened fiscal 2026 with what executives described as record first-quarter sales, earnings per share, and operating margin, led by strength in digital imaging and defense-related demand.
